settings.problem_body: Most supplements are built in labs, not grown in soil. They optimise for trends, not biology.
settings.approach_headline: We start where health actually begins.
settings.system_body: Built for lifespan, not quick wins. One disciplined ritual — not a cabinet of single-note products.
settings.science_body: Not marketing cycles. We publish where we stand — and evolve when the evidence moves.
settings.final_subline: United Kingdom and Germany · Limited founding members

settings.title: Soil → Nutrient density
settings.text: Health signals start upstream — in diversity, structure, and what the soil passes forward.

settings.title: Bioavailability over dosage
settings.text: What you absorb matters more than what you print on a label.

settings.title: System over single product
settings.text: Longevity is a daily signal — not a one-off hero ingredient.
